attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ALT_GSM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.USER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.USER_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ITEM_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.REASON, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP,
  (
 select ALT_GSM_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP
 minus
 select ALT_GSM_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ALT_GSM_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.ALT_GSM_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_SRC_ALT_GSM_MAP)
